summary: Testing iteration 35: Pagination, Lazy Loading, Dashboard Customization, Auto-Backup Settings, and Smart Notifications. Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed). Frontend: All core features working. BackupSystem UI component exists but NOT integrated into any page.

integration_issues.issue: BackupSystem.js exists with full Auto-Backup Settings UI but is NOT imported or used in any page (Settings, Dashboard, etc). The component file at /app/frontend/src/components/BackupSystem.js is orphaned.

action_items: Import and use BackupSystem component in Settings page or create a dedicated Backup page to expose Auto-Backup Settings UI to users
critical_code_review_comments: BackupSystem.js (lines 1-517) has full implementation of Auto-Backup Settings UI but is never imported - needs to be added to Settings page
Dashboard Customizer using @dnd-kit works correctly with 5 draggable widgets
LazyImage component using IntersectionObserver with 100px rootMargin - working correctly
Pagination component properly hides navigation when total_pages <= 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: All pagination APIs (products, customers, sales) working. Dashboard customizer with drag-drop working. SmartNotifications showing low stock alerts (16 products). BackupSystem component file exists but needs to be imported into Settings page to expose the Auto-Backup Settings UI.

products_pagination_api.notes: Returns paginated items, total, page, page_size, total_pages

products_page_pagination_ui.notes: Shows '20' items per page, pagination info 'عرض 1-20 من 20'

dashboard_customizer.notes: Dialog opens with 5 widgets, drag handles visible, save/reset buttons work

smart_notifications_dashboard.notes: Shows 'مخزون منخفض عاجل' alert with 16 products needing restock

backup_system_ui.notes: BackupSystem.js component exists but is NOT imported into any page - backend APIs work but UI not accessible
